'''kakotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chafage|chafage]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-k-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chafage|chafage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kakotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæketheth|kæketheth]] || [[word:kækethej|kækethej]] || [[word:kækethesh|kækethesh]] || [[word:kækethe|kækethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kakokothoth|kakokothoth]] || [[word:kakokothoj|kakokothoj]] || [[word:kakokothosh|kakokothosh]] || [[word:kakokotho|kakokotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kakothoth|kakothoth]] || [[word:kakothoj|kakothoj]] || [[word:kakothosh|kakothosh]] || [[word:kakotho|kakotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kakofthoth|kakofthoth]] || [[word:kakofthoj|kakofthoj]] || [[word:kakofthosh|kakofthosh]] || [[word:kakofthof|kakofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kakothotho|kakothotho]] || [[word:kakothojo|kakothojo]] || [[word:kakothosho|kakothosho]] || [[word:kakothoko|kakothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kakothoth|kakothoth]] || [[word:kakothoj|kakothoj]] || [[word:kakothosh|kakothosh]] || [[word:kakotho|kakotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kakothothol|kakothothol]] || [[word:kakothojol|kakothojol]] || [[word:kakothoshol|kakothoshol]] || [[word:kakothokol|kakothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kakothothotho|kakothothotho]] || [[word:kakothojojo|kakothojojo]] || [[word:kakothoshosho|kakothoshosho]] || [[word:kakothoko|kakothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kakothothon|kakothothon]] || [[word:kakothojon|kakothojon]] || [[word:kakothoshon|kakothoshon]] || [[word:kakothokon|kakothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kakothothoro|kakothothoro]] || [[word:kakothojoro|kakothojoro]] || [[word:kakothoshoro|kakothoshoro]] || [[word:kakothokoro|kakothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
